/* TEAM */
One Link contributors
  github:  https://github.com/IamOneYouAreOneWeAreOne
  email:   weareone@oneunity.earth
  doctrine: we are one

/* THANKS */
Every human who runs a relay.
Every human who pairs a device with another.
Every human who reads the source.

/* SITE */
language:    English
doctype:     HTML5
ia:          12 pages, one-page-one-purpose
standards:   WCAG 2.1 AA, RFC 9116 (security.txt), GDPR-aligned
components:  Rust + WASM + WebTransport + WebGPU
back-end:    Cloudflare Workers + Durable Objects + R2
build:       Coherence-Lang SSG
stack:       no npm, no third-party scripts, no tracking, no cookies
